reasoning: The touch_echo_button_v00 is composited into the scene as a ~160x160px beige square with pixel face, rendering at roughly 5x the 32x32 player reference size. Button-category items must be 50-75% of player size and NEVER larger. At this scale the asset dominates the mid-scene space like a room-sized panel rather than a small interactive prop, producing a wallpaper feel instead of toy diorama. The oversized footprint also breaks perspective coherence with the surrounding floor tiles and wall segments.
